response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified two distinct musical segments. The first song, 'GIRLS' LEGEND U', is well-known from the Umamusume franchise. The second song, 'STARTING OVER', is a track by Omaru Polka, clearly indicated by the on-screen text during the performance. I performed two searches: 1) 'GIRLS' LEGEND U Hololive Japanese and English lyrics' and 2) 'STARTING OVER 尾丸ポルカ Japanese and English lyrics'. Both searches yielded reliable results for lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video snippet from a concert performance by Hololive's Omaru Polka, featuring a group performance of 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' at the beginning, followed by an instrumental transition and a solo performance of her original song 'STARTING OVER'.

scenes.description: Group of VTubers performing 'GIRLS' LEGEND U'.
